title: Smoky Ploughman's Cheese Tartlets
description: A twist on the classic Ploughman's, these bite-sized tartlets combine smoky cheese with a hint of British charm. Perfect as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Smoky cheese
ingredients.notes: such as smoked cheddar or Lancashire

instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Cut out small squares of pastry, about 3 inches (7.5 cm) per side.
Place a small spoonful of smoky cheese in the center of each square.
Top with a small spoonful of morbier cheese.
Fold the pastry squares in half to form triangles, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm with ploughman's crackers and a sprig of fresh thyme.
